---
title: "beta_fit"
generated: true
description: "Mass-univariate beta regression (logit link, estimated precision)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.betareg`](../nitrix-stats-betareg.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:beta_fit -->
```python
beta_fit(Y: Float[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, n_iter: int = 50, ridge: float = 1e-08, block: Optional[int] = None) -> BetaResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:beta_fit -->
Mass-univariate beta regression (logit link, estimated precision).

Fits, per element,
$y_v \sim \operatorname{Beta}(\mu\phi,\, (1 - \mu)\phi)$ with
$\mu = \operatorname{logit}^{-1}(X\beta_v)$ and a per-element
precision $\phi_v$, by Ferrari-Cribari-Neto Fisher scoring.
Responses must lie strictly in $(0, 1)$; values are clipped off the
boundary by `1e-8` (and a host-side warning is raised for out-of-range
inputs when not tracing).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:beta_fit -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `Y` | `Float` | `V` × `N` | — | `(V, N)` responses, each in $(0, 1)$; one row per element. |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` × `p` | — | `(N, p)` design matrix shared across elements (include your own intercept column). |
| `n_iter` | `int` | — | `50` | Number of Fisher-scoring iterations (default `50`). |
| `ridge` | `float` | — | `1e-08` | Small stabiliser added to the diagonal of the normal equations and the Fisher information (default `1e-8`). |
| `block` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Optional element-block size bounding peak memory; `None` processes all elements in one `vmap`. |

**Returns** `BetaResult`. A [`BetaResult`](../nitrix-stats-betareg/BetaResult.qmd) with fields `coef`, `precision`, `cov_unscaled` (the coefficient covariance $\operatorname{Cov}(\hat\beta)$), `log_lik`, and `n_obs`. A fixed-effect contrast is $c^{\top}\hat\beta$ with standard error $\sqrt{c^{\top}\,\mathtt{cov\_unscaled}\,c}$ on $N - p$ degrees of freedom.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:beta_fit -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
